content:
After years of mixing sparkling potions and reading dusty books, I finally found the secret to living forever! I felt like a superhero who could never get tired or grow old. But just then, a shadowy figure appeared—it was Death, but not scary at all. He smiled and handed me a shiny business card.

“When you realize living forever gets boring,” he said, “call this number. I have a job for you.”

I looked at the card. It said, “Death’s Help Desk: Making Life Interesting Since Forever.”

I laughed. Living forever sounded cool, but maybe even superheroes need a break. Maybe one day, I’d call Death’s number and see what his job was like. For now, I decided to enjoy every moment—because even forever needs a little fun!
